overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking across a wooden bridge through a marsh, then continuing along a dirt path through a vibrant grassy meadow with wildflowers. The scene features bright sunlight, lush green vegetation, and a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across a wooden bridge over shallow marsh water, carrying swords on his back

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow footbridge
wooden support post with rope railing on the left side
wooden support post with rope railing on the right side
shallow murky water with reflections beneath the bridge
tall trees surrounding the marsh area in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a wooden footbridge over a marsh. The bridge has weathered planks and wooden posts with rope railings. Shallow water flows beneath, surrounded by trees under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow marsh water with grassy banks

events.description: steps off the wooden bridge into shallow marsh water

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through shallow marsh water, creating ripples with each step

entered.detail: grassy embankment with green vegetation on the left
grassy embankment with green vegetation on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps off the bridge into shallow marsh water. The water ripples around his boots as he wades between grassy banks. Trees line the background under bright sunlight.

events.description: transitions from marsh water onto a dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a dirt path that winds through a grassy meadow, heading uphill

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail with visible footprints and wheel ruts
clusters of red wildflowers along the right path edge
tall purple wildflowers lining the left side of the path
lush green grass covering the meadow on the left
lush green grass covering the meadow on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions from water onto a muddy dirt path that winds uphill through a meadow. Red and purple wildflowers dot the grassy banks while trees frame the scene on both sides.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the dirt path through a vibrant meadow filled with colorful wildflowers

entered.detail: rolling green hills covered in dense grass and wildflowers
rolling green hills covered in dense grass and wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the dirt path as the landscape opens into rolling grassy hills covered in dense wildflowers. Purple and red flowers line the path while the trail continues uphill toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a weathered marshland crossing into a vibrant, flower-filled highland meadow. It begins with him walking across a wooden footbridge with rope railings over shallow water and surrounding trees under a bright blue sky. As he steps off the bridge, the camera follows him wading through rippling marsh water between grassy banks before he transitions onto a muddy dirt path. The scene then opens up as the path winds uphill, shifting from the damp marsh to a lush landscape dotted with red and purple wildflowers. Finally, the terrain expands into rolling grassy hills covered in dense blooms as the trail continues its ascent toward the horizon.
